summary: Iteration 105: All new features verified - Unified Service Booking API, Service Desk Sound Toggle, Care Page Quick Book, 14 Soul Pillars, VAPID Base64 Key

All 14 Soul Pillars correctly defined in SoulExplainerVideo.jsx (lines 48-62)
Service Booking Modal creates tickets with type 'service_booking' visible in Service Desk

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test service bookings (grooming, vet, training, walking) via unified-book API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 105 verified. Service Desk now loads correctly after fixing stats state order. Sound toggle works. Quick Book section on /care page has 4 service buttons.

service_desk_sound_toggle.location: Service Desk header (next to notification bell)
service_desk_sound_toggle.functionality: Toggles notification sound ON/OFF with visual indicator (emerald when ON)

ServiceBookingModal opens on Quick Book button click
Service Desk login works with admin credentials
Service Desk loads without errors after fix
Sound toggle button visible and functional

Service booking tickets visible in ticket list
